creator: kmenzel@whisolutions.com
text:
Hi Kimura,
  The patch works great, but the xerces team did not yet release a 
matching perl upgrade.  Our applications here depend on the 
p5-XML-Xerces port, which currently still depends on  Xerces 2.7.  
Perhaps I need to create a new versioned Xerces-c2.7 port for the perl 
support.

Ken
